relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: A seven-sealed scroll rests in the right hand of the throne.
A strong messenger asks who is worthy to open it.
No created realm can open or see into the scroll.
John weeps over the sealed mystery.
The elder says: do not weep; the Lion of Judah has conquered.
John sees the Lion as a slain-standing Lamb filled with Spirit-sight.
The Lamb takes the scroll from the throne-hand.
Creatures and elders fall with harps and prayer-incense.
The new song says the Lamb is worthy through self-giving life.
A priestly reign from every people is made for earth.
Myriads surround the throne in sound.
The slain Lamb receives all worth.
Every creature blesses the throne and Lamb.

contemplative_note: Revelation 5 is the power-reversal of the whole book: the Lion appears as Lamb, and conquest is revealed as faithful self-giving life.
